title: File Operations
description: Learn to read and write files

scenes.speech: Let's read and write files with Python!
scenes.title: File Operations

scenes.speech: Access files with the open() function!
scenes.title: Opening Files
scenes.content: with open('test.txt', 'r') as f: opens a file. Using 'with' automatically closes it!

scenes.title: Reading Files
scenes.content: f.read() reads all content, f.readline() reads one line, f.readlines() reads all lines as a list!
scenes.highlight: read() all  readline() one line  readlines() all lines

scenes.title: Writing Files
scenes.content: open('output.txt', 'w') for overwrite mode, 'a' for append mode. f.write('text') to write!

scenes.title: CSV Format
scenes.content: import csv to read and write. Process Excel-friendly CSV files easily with Python!

scenes.speech: JSON data used widely on the web!
scenes.title: JSON Format
scenes.content: import json converts between Python dicts and JSON. Almost all API data is JSON!

scenes.title: Path Operations
scenes.content: import os or import pathlib for creating folders, listing files, joining paths!

scenes.speech: What to do when a file isn't found!
scenes.title: Error Handling
scenes.content: try/except FileNotFoundError safely handles the case when a file doesn't exist!
scenes.highlight: try: open() except FileNotFoundError: handle it

scenes.speech: Let's build a real log file system!
scenes.title: Practical: Log Files
scenes.content: Record date, time, and messages to a file. A real-world technique used in production systems!

scenes.speech: You've mastered file operations — practical skills!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
